Venue Info
Media Gallery
Ball Arena
Denver, CO
Previous Names:
Pepsi Center (Changed after 2020)
Seating Capacity: 21000
Venue Type : Indoor Arena

Total Gigs: 4
  DMB  (4)

Longest Performance:
09.13.06 - Jimi Thing (18:32)
Venue Picture
Description
Ball Arena, formerly Pepsi Center, is located on the edge of downtown Denver. It is home to the NBA's Denver Nuggets and the NHL's Colorado Avalanche.
